violations.text: The establishment does not employ a full-time, on-site manager certified in food safety at all times when time temperature control for safety (TCS) food is being prepared, handled, and/or served. Expired on 04/12/2024. New Violation. Correct By: 05/06/2026

Food contact surfaces of equipment/utensils (can opener) were observed with an accumulation of food and debris. The food contact surfaces of equipment must be clean to sight and touch. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 05/06/2026

The door to the outside, located at the front entrance, is not tight-fitting. Outer openings of a food establishment must be protected against the entry of insects and rodents by tight-fitting doors. New Violation. Correct By: 05/20/2026
Walk-in cooler door gaskets were observed torn and in poor repair. New Violation. Correct By: 05/20/2026
The establishment does not have an allergen statement present for consumer awareness. New Violation. Correct By: 08/16/2023

There was no evidence that employees are required to report to the person in charge information about their health (illnesses, symptoms) as they relate to diseases that are transmissible through food. New Violation. Correct By: 08/02/2023
The establishment does not have a written procedure for cleaning vomit and diarrhea. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 08/02/2023
Rodenticide observed uncovered in the stairwell area. Rodent bait shall be contained in a covered, tamper-resistant bait station. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 08/02/2023
The facility is lacking test strips to measure the concentration of the chlorine sanitizing solution for the dishwasher. New Violation. Correct By: 08/16/2023

The floors behind the equipment in the kitchen area has an accumulation food debris. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. New Violation. Correct By: 08/02/2023
